subcategory: React hook - media query detection utility
use_cases: Detect screen width for responsive component rendering
Toggle mobile-specific UI elements or layouts
Trigger different behaviors on mobile vs desktop
Monitor media query changes in real-time during window resize
Replace manual window.innerWidth checks with declarative hook
ai_summary: A lightweight React hook utility that wraps the browser's matchMedia API to detect media query matching state. Returns a boolean that updates automatically when the media query condition changes. Includes a convenient useIsMobile hook for common mobile breakpoint detection at 768px. Useful for declarative responsive design patterns in React components.
